ios.name: REZ — Earn While You Spend
ios.subtitle: Cashback & Loyalty Rewards
ios.description:
REZ turns every purchase into cashback coins. Scan QR codes at partner stores, earn coins instantly, redeem for discounts. Track your savings, build streaks, and climb the leaderboard.

• Instant cashback on every purchase
• Daily streak rewards
• Group buy with friends
• 2× coins with REZ Premium
• Nearby store finder with live offers
